zh.County Donegal, Ulster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Chloe Coward於1665年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親John Coward39歲，母親Mrs John Coward38歲。她於1690年與Alexander Kirkpatrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年在英國蘇格蘭享年47歲。

zh-hans.County Donegal, Ulster, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chloe Coward于1665年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲John Coward39岁，母亲Mrs John Coward38岁。她于1690年与Alexander Kirkpatrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年在英国苏格兰享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a cowherd, Middle English couh(i)erde, couhirde, couhurde (Old English cūhyrde). The surname has nothing to do with the modern English word coward, which is from Old French cuard, a pejorative term from coue ‘tail’ (from Latin cauda) with reference to an animal with its tail between its legs.

variants.name: Cowart
meanings: English: variant of   Coward  . This name is most common in GA.

variants.name: Cowherd
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): variant of Coward , perhaps a deliberate respelling by a bearer anxious to avoid association with the unrelated modern English word coward.
Possibly also a variant of   Cowher  , a surname of German origin.

nameMeanings.name: Chloe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘khloh-ee’: from the Late Greek name Khloē, originally used in the classical period as an epithet of the fertility goddess Demeter. It may be indirectly connected with Chloris . A person of this name receives a fleeting mention in the New Testament (1 Corinthians 1:11), and its use as a given name in the English-speaking world almost certainly derives from this reference, leading to its adoption in the 17th century among the Puritans. It has fared better since than many of the minor biblical names taken up at that time (see appendices 15–22), having in recent decades also appeared in combinations such as Chloe-Anne, Chloe-Louise, and Chloe-Marie.

en.lifeSummary: When Chloe Coward was born in 1665, in Scotland, her father, John Coward, was 39 and her mother, Mrs John Coward, was 38. She married Alexander Kirkpatrick in 1690, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1712, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chloe Coward est née en 1665, à Écosse, son père, John Coward, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Coward, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Kirkpatrick en 1690, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1712, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chloe Coward 1665 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Coward 39 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Coward 38. Sie hat 1690 in Scotland Alexander Kirkpatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1712 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chloe Coward è nata il nel 1665 nel Scotland, sua padre, John Coward, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mrs John Coward, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Kirkpatrick nel 1690, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1712, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chloe Cowardが1665年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Cowardは39歳，母Mrs John Cowardは38歳であった。1690年にスコットランドでAlexander Kirkpatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年にイギリススコットランドで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chloe Coward(이)가 1665년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Coward(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Coward(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1690년 스컷랜드에서 Alexander Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chloe Coward nasceu em 1665, em Scotland, seu pai, John Coward, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Coward, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Kirkpatrick em 1690, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1712, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chloe Coward родилась в 1665 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Coward было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Coward, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Kirkpatrick в 1690 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1712 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chloe Coward nació en 1665, en Scotland, su papá, John Coward, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mrs John Coward, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Alexander Kirkpatrick en 1690, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1712, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
